SELECT COUNT(*) AS dog_count
FROM Has_Pet hp
JOIN Student s ON hp.StuID = s.StuID
JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID
WHERE s.Sex = 'F' AND LOWER(p.PetType) = 'dog';
final.answer_text: There are 2 dogs raised by female students.
